title: LE4 6BW, BOSTIK LIMITED: permit surrender issued - EPR/KP3639FU/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter for:    Operator name: BOSTIK LIMITED   Installation name: Ulverscroft Road Polymer Plant   Permit number: EPR/KP3639FU/S003   "
